column1: 1. This is YOUR PERSONAL hours entry - Only you can see your data
2. Enter only YOUR hours in the sections below
3. Regular = standard work hours | Holiday = statutory holidays
4. Vacation = vacation days taken | Paternity/Maternity = leave taken
5. Special $ = any bonuses or extra payments
6. Your pay rate is CONFIDENTIAL and not shown here
7. Once submitted, your manager will verify and process payroll
